item.title: About
item.description: Thomas willow is a conductor, pianist, guitarist, singer, producer and songwriter. Described by clash magazine as a young Leonard Cohen, Thomas Willow’s music is an array of soft strings and piano melodies that underpin his soulful vocals. Thomas Willow is the man behind “Willow & Friends choir“ that creates standalone events often in listed buildings or churches. His music is timeless, elegant and profound. Qualities rare to come by in modern day music.

item.title: Media
item.description: Thomas Willow Jazz Show Reel (video &copy Peggy Pollock) Download Show Reel & Price sheet HERE.

item.title: Producer
item.description: Thomas Willow Production & Mix Engineer Work. Thomas Willow · Thomas Willow - Producer/Mix Engineer
